min-block-size.$description: dimension used by the tab component for min block size.

padding-inline.$description: dimension used by the tab component for padding inline.

gap.$description: dimension used by the tab component for gap.

radius.$description: dimension used by the tab component for radius.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the tab component for font size.

font-weight.$description: font weight used by the tab component for font weight.

line-height.$description: dimension used by the tab component for line height.

fg.$description: color used by the tab component for selected rest foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the tab component for selected rest background.

fg.$description: color used by the tab component for selected hover foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the tab component for selected hover background.

fg.$description: color used by the tab component for selected active foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the tab component for selected active background.

fg.$description: color used by the tab component for selected disabled foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the tab component for selected disabled background.

fg.$description: color used by the tab component for unselected rest foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the tab component for unselected rest background.

fg.$description: color used by the tab component for unselected hover foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the tab component for unselected hover background.

fg.$description: color used by the tab component for unselected active foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the tab component for unselected active background.

fg.$description: color used by the tab component for unselected disabled foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the tab component for unselected disabled background.

size.$description: dimension used by the tab component for indicator size.

color.$description: color used by the tab component for indicator color.

radius.$description: dimension used by the tab component for indicator radius.

color.$description: color used by the tab component for focus ring color.

width.$description: dimension used by the tab component for focus ring width.

offset.$description: dimension used by the tab component for focus ring offset.
